feedItems.description: allocated £3.9m to Environment & Streets (≈£40 per resident)
allocated £4.0m to Culture & Leisure (≈£41 per resident)
allocated £5.4m to Council Running Costs (≈£55 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £76 (3.6%) to £2216
